name: #277 · 633690675e7448cb0911920369251e9000f3999d · Karol Wojcik · feat: make stealth mode automatic for all CLI and eval commands

newTests.name: Tests for new global flags > --stealth / --no-stealth flags > defaults stealth to true
Tests for new global flags > --stealth / --no-stealth flags > --stealth explicitly sets stealth to true
Tests for new global flags > --stealth / --no-stealth flags > --no-stealth disables stealth
